title: Charminar
subTitle: Mohana is in love with his classmate Radha but fails to convey his feelings and moves abroad. When the school reunion is arranged, he returns hoping to meet Radha but is shocked when he meets her.

subTitle: Because of Vikram's carefree nature, the police commissioner hires a retired army officer to discipline Vikram. Things take a tricky turn when Vikram falls in love with the officer's daughter.

subTitle: Kashi moves heaven and earth to fulfil his mother's dying wish of educating his brother, Vishwa. But things take an unusual turn when Vishwa falls in love with a business tycoon's daughter.

subTitle: Subash, the owner of a well-established company, finds his world turned upside down when he falls for Indira, oblivious to the dark secret she conceals.

title: Bal Nan Maga
subTitle: Jagdeesh, a menial worker, falls for Sangeetha, and asks for her hand in marriage. Her father agrees on one condition, he must procure a sum of one lakh rupees.

subTitle: After his death, Upendra, an aspiring gangster, ends up in hell. However, when he falls in love with Indraja, Lord Indra's daughter, he must convince Yama to send him to heaven.
